# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Mar 27, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
The day saw the introduction of a new plugin, `plugin-x402-swarms`, which integrates x402 payments with Swarms multi-agent orchestration, marking a step towards enhanced payment and agent coordination capabilities.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
A new pull request, [#322](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/322), was opened to add `plugin-x402-swarms`. This plugin aims to combine x402 payments with Swarms multi-agent orchestration, enhancing the registry's capabilities for decentralized payment and agent coordination.
